title: CI-RED-015-D-a wire URL collision audit (diagnosis only)
intent: Add wire-URL resolution audit tool + report. Measures manifest_prefix + router_prefix + decorator_path to separate real wire-URL collisions from decorator-path false positives. No CI gate or runtime behavior change; remediation is a follow-up (015-D-b).

diff_articulation.what_changed: New static-analysis tool scripts/audit_wire_urls.py resolves full wire URLs from manifest + APIRouter + decorator prefixes; writes metrics/wire_url_audit.json; handoff doc records findings. Reproducible: 1181 endpoints, 68 wire-URL collisions, 85 decorator false positives, 143 unmanifested files.
diff_articulation.why_not_redundant: audit_endpoints.py measures decorator suffixes only and inflates duplicates by 85 false positives. This is the first audit that resolves actual wire URLs, so the 68 collisions are a new, actionable signal the debt gate has never measured.

files.intent: Wire-URL resolution audit tool (manifest + router + decorator prefix join).
files.behavior_change: none — new diagnostic script, not wired into any gate
verification: cd services/api && python scripts/audit_wire_urls.py reproduces 68 collisions / 85 false positives

files.intent: Full audit output: collisions, false positives, unmanifested routers, all endpoints.
Diagnosis handoff: collision report, false-positive analysis, remediation plan for 015-D-b.
